description_long: This object is a flat, circular, black disc with a small central hole, resembling a vinyl record or the platter of a record player. The surface appears smooth and featureless, with no visible controls, buttons, or additional components such as a tonearm or stylus. The disc is thin and has a consistent thickness throughout, with no raised or recessed areas. There are no visible markings, grooves, or textures on the surface, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The color is uniformly black, and the finish appears matte or slightly smooth. The object is likely made of plastic or a similar lightweight material.
description: A flat, black, circular disc with a central hole, resembling a minimalist record player platter. The surface is smooth and featureless, with no visible controls or additional components.
description_view_0: From this view, the object appears as a flat, black disc with a central hole, showing its circular shape and smooth surface.
description_view_1: This angle also displays the flat, circular form and central hole, with no additional features visible.
description_view_2: The disc remains featureless and black, with the central hole clearly visible and no other components apparent.
description_view_3: The circular disc and central hole are again visible, with the smooth, black surface dominating the view.
attribute_turntable_platter: Present as a large, flat, circular disc with a central hole. The platter is black, smooth, and featureless, occupying the entire visible area of the object. No grooves, markings, or design elements are visible.
